response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience but lacks the core requirements for this role. There is no evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency, no embedded firmware or LAN-switch development experience, no Linux kernel modification work, and minimal C programming (only a brief stint at National Instruments a decade ago). The security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal) and networking protocols (NETCONF, SNMP) required are absent from the resume.
strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, desktop and embedded contexts
Some C/C++ exposure from National Instruments LabWindows/CVI work
Strong testing discipline (TDD, CI/CD, workshops on testing methodologies)
concerns: No indication of Japanese language proficiency (native-level required, hard gate)
No embedded networking, LAN-switch, or Linux kernel modification experience
Lacks required security domain knowledge (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption protocols)
